zh.lifeSummary: 當Reynold de Abrahall於大約1282年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾維斯特波--瑟維時，他的父親Ralph de Abrahall de Mitcheldean69歲，母親Mrs. Matilda De Abrahall29歲。他於大約1315年與Mrs Reginald de Abenhale在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1341年8月30日享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reynold de Abrahall于大约1282年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾維斯特波--瑟維时，他的父亲Ralph de Abrahall de Mitcheldean69岁，母亲Mrs. Matilda De Abrahall29岁。他于大约1315年与Mrs Reginald de Abenhale在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1341年8月30日享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Abrahall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Aberhall in Hentland (Herefs), which is recorded as Aberhale in 1334. The place-name may mean ‘Eadburh's nook’, from the Old English female personal name Ēadburh (genitive Ēadburge) + halh ‘nook, corner’, though the first element is uncertain.

nameMeanings.name: Reynold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Reinald, Reynaud, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + wald ‘ruler’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them into England. In modern use, the given name sometimes represents a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman personal name.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Reynold de Abrahall was born about 1282, in Westbury-on-Severn, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Ralph de Abrahall de Mitcheldean, was 69 and his mother, Mrs. Matilda De Abrahall, was 29. He married Mrs Reginald de Abenhale about 1315, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 30 August 1341, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reynold de Abrahall est né environ 1282, à Westbury-on-Severn, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Abrahall de Mitcheldean, avait 69 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Matilda De Abrahall, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Reginald de Abenhale environ 1315, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 30 août 1341, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reynold de Abrahall um 1282 in Westbury-on-Severn, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Abrahall de Mitcheldean 69 und seine Mutter Mrs. Matilda De Abrahall 29. Er hat um 1315 in England, United Kingdom Mrs Reginald de Abenhale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 30. August 1341 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold de Abrahall è nato il circa 1282 nel Westbury-on-Severn, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Abrahall de Mitcheldean, aveva 69 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Matilda De Abrahall, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Reginald de Abenhale circa 1315, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 30 agosto 1341, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reynold de Abrahallが約1282年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウエストブリ-オン-セバーンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Abrahall de Mitcheldeanは69歳，母Mrs. Matilda De Abrahallは29歳であった。約1315年にイギリスイギリスでMrs Reginald de Abenhaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1341年8月30日に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reynold de Abrahall(이)가 대략 1282년 영국 그루스스터실르 웨스트버이--세버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Abrahall de Mitcheldean(은)는 69세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Matilda De Abrahall(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1315년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Mrs Reginald de Abenhale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1341년 8월 30일 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold de Abrahall nasceu aproximadamente 1282, em Westbury-on-Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Abrahall de Mitcheldean, tinha 69 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Matilda De Abrahall, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Reginald de Abenhale aproximadamente 1315, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 30 de agosto de 1341, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reynold de Abrahall родился около 1282 г. в местности вестбури-он-сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Abrahall de Mitcheldean было 69 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Matilda De Abrahall, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Reginald de Abenhale около 1315 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 30 августа 1341 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

Se casó con Mrs Reginald de Abenhale aproximadamente 1315, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 30 de agosto de 1341, a la edad de 60 años.
